content.text:
No SSH key is set up for GitHub. You need to either:

1. **Add an SSH key to GitHub** — generate one with `ssh-keygen -t ed25519 -C "your@email.com"`, then add `~/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub` to [github.com/settings/keys](https://github.com/settings/keys)
2. **Use a GitHub token** — switch back to HTTPS and use a personal access token as the password

Do you have an SSH key already set up, or would you prefer to use HTTPS with a token?

No keys exist yet. Run this to generate one:

```
! ssh-keygen -t ed25519 -C "your@email.com"
```

Then show the public key to add to GitHub:

```
! cat ~/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub
```

Once you've added it at github.com/settings/keys, I'll push for you.
